requirement_topic.en: EMC — INEN NTE Standards (Radiated and Conducted Emissions, IEC CISPR / IEC 61000 aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——INEN NTE标准（辐射和传导发射，IEC CISPR / IEC 61000对标）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——INEN NTE標準（輻射和傳導發射，IEC CISPR / IEC 61000對標）

summary.en: Ecuador follows INEN (Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalización) NTE (Norma Técnica Ecuatoriana) standards, which adopt IEC and CISPR international standards for electromagnetic compatibility. Wireless and IoT devices are expected to comply with NTE INEN equivalents of CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions) and IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3 (conducted emissions and power harmonics). EMC compliance evidence is required as part of the ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier. Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz supply means conducted-emissions test conditions differ from those performed at 220 V / 50 Hz (China and Europe). INEN also administers mandatory RTE INEN (Reglamentos Técnicos Ecuatorianos) for certain product categories — exporters should verify whether their product category falls under an applicable RTE INEN.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔遵循INEN（厄瓜多尔标准化服务局）NTE（厄瓜多尔技术规范）标准，该标准采用IEC和CISPR国际标准作为电磁兼容性依据。无线及物联网设备须符合NTE INEN等效的CISPR 32（多媒体设备发射）和IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3（传导发射和电源谐波）标准。EMC合规证明须作为ARCOTEL型式认可技术档案的一部分提交。厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz供电意味着传导发射测试条件与在220V/50Hz（中国和欧洲）下的测试条件不同。INEN还管理特定产品类别的强制性RTE INEN（厄瓜多尔技术法规）——出口商应核实其产品类别是否适用相关RTE INEN。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多遵循INEN（厄瓜多標準化服務局）NTE（厄瓜多技術規範）標準，該標準採用IEC和CISPR國際標準作為電磁相容性依據。無線及物聯網裝置須符合NTE INEN等效的CISPR 32（多媒體設備發射）和IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3（傳導發射和電源諧波）標準。EMC合規證明須作為ARCOTEL型式認可技術檔案的一部分提交。厄瓜多120V/60Hz供電意味著傳導發射測試條件與在220V/50Hz（中國和歐洲）下的測試條件不同。INEN還管理特定產品類別的強制性RTE INEN（厄瓜多技術法規）——出口商應核實其產品類別是否適用相關RTE INEN。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN equivalents of CISPR 32 — emissions limits for multimedia and IT equipment (adopted from IEC/CISPR)
NTE INEN equivalents of IEC 61000-3-2 — harmonic current limits for mains-connected equipment
NTE INEN equivalents of IEC 61000-3-3 — voltage fluctuations and flicker limits
RTE INEN (Reglamentos Técnicos Ecuatorianos) — mandatory technical regulations for applicable product categories
ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier requirements — EMC test reports as part of type-approval submission

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and information technology equipment is governed by GB 9254 / GB/T 9254 (radiated emissions, aligned with CISPR 32), GB 17625.1 (harmonic currents, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2), and GB 17625.2 (voltage fluctuations, aligned with IEC 61000-3-3). Products in scope of CCC require EMC testing by a CNCA-authorised laboratory. Chinese tests are conducted at 220 V / 50 Hz; Ecuador uses 120 V / 60 Hz. GB test data from CNAS-accredited labs may not be directly accepted by ARCOTEL — if the laboratory also holds ILAC accreditation and test parameters align with the applicable NTE INEN / CISPR standard, partial data reuse may be possible but must be confirmed.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及信息技术设备的EMC合规由GB 9254 / GB/T 9254（辐射发射，与CISPR 32对齐）、GB 17625.1（谐波电流，与IEC 61000-3-2对齐）和GB 17625.2（电压波动，与IEC 61000-3-3对齐）约束。属于CCC范围的产品须由CNCA认可实验室进行EMC检测。中国测试在220V/50Hz下进行；厄瓜多尔采用120V/60Hz。若实验室同时持有ILAC认可资质且检测参数与适用NTE INEN / CISPR标准一致，CNAS认可实验室出具的GB检测数据或可部分复用，但须向ARCOTEL确认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及資訊技術設備的EMC合規由GB 9254 / GB/T 9254（輻射發射，與CISPR 32對齊）、GB 17625.1（諧波電流，與IEC 61000-3-2對齊）和GB 17625.2（電壓波動，與IEC 61000-3-3對齊）約束。屬於CCC範圍的產品須由CNCA認可實驗室進行EMC檢測。中國測試在220V/50Hz下進行；厄瓜多採用120V/60Hz。若實驗室同時持有ILAC認可資質且檢測參數與適用NTE INEN / CISPR標準一致，CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB檢測數據或可部分複用，但須向ARCOTEL確認。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 / GB/T 9254 — China EMC radiated emissions standard for IT equipment (aligned with CISPR 32)
GB 17625.1 — China harmonic currents standard (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
GB 17625.2 — China voltage fluctuations standard (aligned with IEC 61000-3-3)
CCC EMC testing — required by CNCA-authorised labs for products in CCC scope

gap.en: Partial gap: Technical limits are IEC/CISPR-harmonised, so Chinese GB EMC data may have engineering relevance. However, ARCOTEL requires test reports from laboratories it recognises; Chinese CNAS-only laboratory reports may not be accepted directly. For conducted emissions, Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz supply differs from China's 220 V / 50 Hz mains — Chinese conducted-emission test data at 220 V may not directly satisfy NTE INEN requirements tested at 120 V, and retesting or voltage-equivalence engineering justification may be required. Chinese CCC EMC certificates are not recognised in Ecuador. Confirm accepted laboratory accreditation bodies and dossier requirements with ARCOTEL and INEN before shipment.
gap.zh: 部分差距：技术限值与IEC/CISPR接轨，中国GB EMC数据可能具有工程参考价值。但ARCOTEL要求提供其认可的实验室出具的检测报告；仅持有CNAS认可的中国实验室报告可能无法被直接接受。就传导发射而言，厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz供电与中国220V/50Hz市电不同——在220V下获得的中国传导发射数据可能无法直接满足在120V下测试的NTE INEN要求，可能需要重测或提供电压等效工程论证。中国CCC EMC证书在厄瓜多尔不被认可。发货前请与ARCOTEL和INEN确认受理的实验室认可机构和档案要求。
gap.zht: 部分差距：技術限值與IEC/CISPR接軌，中國GB EMC數據可能具有工程參考價值。但ARCOTEL要求提供其認可的實驗室出具的檢測報告；僅持有CNAS認可的中國實驗室報告可能無法被直接接受。就傳導發射而言，厄瓜多120V/60Hz供電與中國220V/50Hz市電不同——在220V下獲得的中國傳導發射數據可能無法直接滿足在120V下測試的NTE INEN要求，可能需要重測或提供電壓等效工程論證。中國CCC EMC證書在厄瓜多不被認可。發貨前請與ARCOTEL和INEN確認受理的實驗室認可機構和檔案要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance evidence (NTE INEN / CISPR-based test reports) required as part of the ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier; RTE INEN mandatory for applicable product categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 / GB/T 9254 EMC testing required for CCC-scope products; GB 17625.1 / GB 17625.2 conducted-emissions testing required where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador applies INEN NTE standards (adopting IEC/CISPR) for EMC compliance. EMC test data from Chinese GB testing may be partially reusable if generated at an ILAC-accredited laboratory, but conducted-emissions tests performed at 220 V / 50 Hz may require supplemental testing at 120 V / 60 Hz for Ecuador. Direct recognition of Chinese CCC EMC certificates is not granted by INEN or ARCOTEL. Verify current NTE INEN and RTE INEN requirements and ARCOTEL test-report acceptance criteria with a qualified Ecuadorian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔采用INEN NTE标准（采用IEC/CISPR）进行EMC合规。若在ILAC认可实验室生成，中国GB检测数据可能部分可复用，但在220V/50Hz下进行的传导发射测试可能需要在120V/60Hz下补充测试。INEN和ARCOTEL不认可中国CCC EMC证书。请向合格的厄瓜多尔监管专业人士核验现行NTE INEN和RTE INEN要求及ARCOTEL检测报告认可标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多採用INEN NTE標準（採用IEC/CISPR）進行EMC合規。若在ILAC認可實驗室生成，中國GB檢測數據可能部分可複用，但在220V/50Hz下進行的傳導發射測試可能需要在120V/60Hz下補充測試。INEN和ARCOTEL不認可中國CCC EMC證書。請向合格的厄瓜多監管專業人士核驗現行NTE INEN和RTE INEN要求及ARCOTEL檢測報告認可標準。

requirement_topic.en: Spanish Labelling — ARCOTEL Homologación Number and Mandatory Product Information (INEN Labelling Rules)
requirement_topic.zh: 西班牙语标注——ARCOTEL认证编号及强制性产品信息（INEN标注规则）
requirement_topic.zht: 西班牙語標注——ARCOTEL認證編號及強制性產品資訊（INEN標注規則）

summary.en: All devices sold in Ecuador must carry Spanish-language labels. The ARCOTEL homologación certificate number must appear on the product label or packaging. Labels must identify the product model, manufacturer or importer, country of origin, and ARCOTEL approval number. INEN labelling rules under NTE INEN standards and applicable RTE INEN regulations govern consumer product labelling for listed categories. Labels exclusively in Chinese, English, or other non-Spanish languages do not satisfy Ecuadorian requirements. Where a device bears an FCC ID or CE mark, these do not substitute for or imply ARCOTEL compliance — the ARCOTEL number must also be present. SENAE (customs) may verify label compliance at import.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔销售的所有设备须贴附西班牙语标签。ARCOTEL型式认可证书编号须标注于产品标签或包装上。标签须标明产品型号、制造商或进口商、原产国及ARCOTEL核准编号。NTE INEN标准和适用RTE INEN法规下的INEN标注规则管理列明类别消费品的标注要求。仅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙语标签不满足厄瓜多尔要求。若设备标有FCC ID或CE标志，这些标志不能替代或暗示ARCOTEL合规——ARCOTEL编号亦须同时标注。SENAE（海关）可能在进口时核查标签合规情况。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多銷售的所有設備須貼附西班牙語標籤。ARCOTEL型式認可證書編號須標注於產品標籤或包裝上。標籤須標明產品型號、製造商或進口商、原產國及ARCOTEL核准編號。NTE INEN標準和適用RTE INEN法規下的INEN標注規則管理列明類別消費品的標注要求。僅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙語標籤不滿足厄瓜多要求。若裝置標有FCC ID或CE標誌，這些標誌不能替代或暗示ARCOTEL合規——ARCOTEL編號亦須同時標注。SENAE（海關）可能在進口時核查標籤合規情況。

standards_or_laws: ARCOTEL homologación regulations — mandatory display of ARCOTEL certificate number on product label
NTE INEN labelling standards — Spanish-language mandatory product information for consumer products in Ecuador
RTE INEN applicable to product category — mandatory technical regulation labelling requirements where applicable
Ley Orgánica de Defensa del Consumidor — Ecuadorian consumer-protection law requiring accurate Spanish-language product information
SENAE import controls — customs verification of labelling compliance at the border

summary.en: In China, consumer electronics and electrical products must display Simplified Chinese labelling including product model, manufacturer name and address, rated voltage and power, and the CCC certification mark and number where applicable. Chinese labelling standards are governed by GB 5296 series and mandatory CCC label requirements. These Chinese labelling requirements are entirely separate from Ecuadorian labelling obligations — Spanish-language labels with the ARCOTEL number must be added for the Ecuadorian market.
summary.zh: 在中国，消费电子和电气产品须贴附简体中文标签，包含产品型号、制造商名称和地址、额定电压和功率，以及适用时的CCC认证标志和编号。中国标注标准由GB 5296系列和强制性CCC标签要求规范。上述中国标注要求与厄瓜多尔标注义务完全独立——须为厄瓜多尔市场增加含ARCOTEL编号的西班牙语标签。
summary.zht: 在中國，消費電子和電氣產品須貼附簡體中文標籤，包含產品型號、製造商名稱和地址、額定電壓和功率，以及適用時的CCC認證標誌和編號。中國標注標準由GB 5296系列和強制性CCC標籤要求規範。上述中國標注要求與厄瓜多標注義務完全獨立——須為厄瓜多市場增加含ARCOTEL編號的西班牙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 5296 series — Chinese consumer product labelling standards (Simplified Chinese mandatory)
CCC label requirements — mandatory CCC mark and certificate number display for in-scope products sold in China

gap.en: Full gap for labelling language and ARCOTEL number: Chinese-language or English-language-only labels do not satisfy Ecuadorian requirements. For the Ecuadorian market, a Spanish-language label must be prepared that includes the ARCOTEL homologación number, manufacturer or importer identity, product model, and country of origin. Labels can be applied as a sticker overlay for market entry. The ARCOTEL number cannot be added until the homologación certificate is issued — labelling must therefore be planned as a post-certification step. INEN labelling requirements under applicable RTE INEN may impose additional product-specific information obligations.
gap.zh: 标签语言和ARCOTEL编号方面存在完全差距：仅使用中文或英文标签不满足厄瓜多尔要求。针对厄瓜多尔市场，须制作包含ARCOTEL型式认可编号、制造商或进口商信息、产品型号及原产国的西班牙语标签。入市时可采用贴纸叠加方式加贴标签。ARCOTEL编号须在取得认证证书后方可添加——因此标注须作为认证后步骤进行规划。适用RTE INEN下的INEN标注要求可能对特定产品规定额外的信息义务。
gap.zht: 標籤語言和ARCOTEL編號方面存在完全差距：僅使用中文或英文標籤不滿足厄瓜多要求。針對厄瓜多市場，須製作包含ARCOTEL型式認可編號、製造商或進口商資訊、產品型號及原產國的西班牙語標籤。入市時可採用貼紙疊加方式加貼標籤。ARCOTEL編號須在取得認證證書後方可添加——因此標注須作為認證後步驟進行規劃。適用RTE INEN下的INEN標注要求可能對特定產品規定額外的資訊義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Spanish-language labelling with ARCOTEL homologación number required for all devices sold in Ecuador; additional INEN/RTE INEN labelling requirements apply to listed product categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Simplified Chinese labelling and CCC mark required for in-scope products sold in China under GB 5296 and CCC rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador requires Spanish-language labels with the ARCOTEL homologación number on all wireless and telecom terminal equipment. Chinese-only or English-only labels do not comply. Additional INEN NTE and RTE INEN labelling requirements may apply depending on product category. The ARCOTEL number must be obtained before the label can be finalised. Verify current INEN labelling scope, applicable RTE INEN, and ARCOTEL label-format requirements with a qualified Ecuadorian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔要求所有无线及电信终端设备贴附含ARCOTEL型式认可编号的西班牙语标签。仅使用中文或英文标签不合规。其他INEN NTE和RTE INEN标注要求可能视产品类别而适用。ARCOTEL编号须在定稿标签前取得。请向合格的厄瓜多尔监管专业人士核验现行INEN标注范围、适用RTE INEN及ARCOTEL标签格式要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多要求所有無線及電信終端裝置貼附含ARCOTEL型式認可編號的西班牙語標籤。僅使用中文或英文標籤不合規。其他INEN NTE和RTE INEN標注要求可能視產品類別而適用。ARCOTEL編號須在定稿標籤前取得。請向合格的厄瓜多監管專業人士核驗現行INEN標注範圍、適用RTE INEN及ARCOTEL標籤格式要求。
